description: You are working with the Chinook music store database in LibreOffice Base (/home/ga/chinook.odb). Your task is to create a new derived table named "EmployeeSalesSummary" that summarizes sales performance by employee for a compensation review. The table must contain the following columns: "EmployeeId" (INTEGER, NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY), "FullName" (VARCHAR(100), first and last name separated by a space), "Title" (VARCHAR(50)), "TotalCustomers" (INTEGER, count of distinct customers assigned to the employee), "TotalInvoices" (INTEGER, count of distinct invoices from the employee's customers), and "TotalSalesAmount" (NUMERIC(10,2), sum of Invoice.Total for the employee's customers). Populate the table by joining "Employee" to "Customer" (via Employee.EmployeeId = Customer.SupportRepId) and "Customer" to "Invoice" (via Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId), grouping by employee and including only those who have at least one customer. Note that the Chinook database uses double-quoted identifiers for table and column names. Ensure all changes are persisted to the database file.
